mapper.select:
SELECT b.board_id AS boardId, b.title, b.content, b.writer, b.reg_date AS regDate, b.view_cnt AS viewCnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_file f WHERE f.board_id = b.board_id) AS fileCount FROM vueboard b
AND b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND b.writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND b.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR b.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY b.board_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vueboard
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
SELECT board_id AS boardId, title, content, writer, reg_date AS regDate, view_cnt AS viewCnt FROM vueboard WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vueboard (title, content, writer) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{writer})
INSERT INTO board_file (board_id, original_name, save_name, file_path, file_size) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{originalName}, #{saveName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize})
mapper.select: SELECT file_id AS fileId, board_id AS boardId, original_name AS originalName, save_name AS saveName, file_path AS filePath, file_size AS fileSize, reg_date AS regDate FROM board_file WHERE board_id = #{boardId}

SELECT file_id AS fileId, board_id AS boardId, original_name AS originalName, save_name AS saveName, file_path AS filePath, file_size AS fileSize, reg_date AS regDate FROM board_file WHERE file_id = #{fileId}
